title: qa-gate-verifier verdict
description: The ONLY verdict that advances a wave past a build step. Produced by an independent qa-gate-verifier that re-runs the gate against the author's changed files and ignores any self-reported gate_result.

steps.description: each gate step actually run (lint, build, automation-critical, cook-smoke, gauntlet, index)

logs_tail.description: last ~50 lines of the first failing step

self_report_matched.description: did the author's self-reported gate_result match reality? (audit signal; not used for gating)
